hero.subtitle: E-bikes, city bikes, electric cargo bikes and kids bikes. Easy online booking, local pickup — ready when you are.

categories.title: What Would You Like to Ride?
categories.subtitle: From casual city rides to family adventures — we have the right bike for every type of rider.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From browsing to riding in under 2 minutes. No surprises, no paperwork.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Browse our fleet, compare specs and pricing, and find the perfect bike for your ride.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Select your rental period and preferred pickup location. Check real-time availability.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Complete your booking through our secure checkout. Instant confirmation by email.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Show your confirmation at pickup, grab your helmet and lock, and enjoy the ride.

featured.title: Most Popular Rentals

whyUs.title: Why Choose Drahtesel
whyUs.subtitle: We are not a generic rental platform. We are a local business that cares about your ride.
whyUs.feat1Desc: Every bike is serviced and checked before each rental. You ride, we handle the maintenance.
whyUs.feat2Desc: Personal handover at our central location. We are here to answer your questions in person.
whyUs.feat3Desc: Call or message us anytime. Real people, fast responses — in German and English.
whyUs.feat4Desc: Helmet, lock, and repair kit included with every rental. No surprise extras at pickup.
whyUs.feat5Desc: Over 150 verified reviews from real customers. Trust built over years of service.
whyUs.feat6Desc: Full day, multi-day, or weekly. We work around your schedule.
